---
title: "06 Segment Programs"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
source("01_main_setup.R")
module <- "06_segment_programs"
```

```{r}
segments <- read_optional_tsv(file.path(result_dir, "10_segment_objects", "tables", "segment_summary.tsv"))
programs <- read_optional_tsv(file.path(result_dir, "11_programs_differential", "tables", "nmf_program_top_genes.tsv"))
if (nrow(segments) > 0) {
  write_review_table(segments, module, "segment_summary_review.csv")
  p <- segments |>
    ggplot(aes(source_label, n_spots, fill = source_label)) +
    geom_boxplot(show.legend = FALSE) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = rep(pandoraseq_palette, 50)) +
    theme_spatial() +
    labs(x = NULL, y = "Spots per segment")
  save_plot_versions(p, module, "segment_size_by_label", width = 7, height = 5)
  p
}
if (nrow(programs) > 0) {
  write_review_table(programs, module, "nmf_program_top_genes_review.csv")
}
```
